iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 47% (stable). Day 24 Hour 05 UTC. CRITICAL (stable). 180+ wounded in Iranian missile strikes on Arad/Dimona near Dimona nuclear reactor. Natanz struck again by US-Israel (IAEA confirms, no radiation leak). IAEA Grossi pursuing diplomatic channel - only off-ramp. Iran intercepts US drone over Tehran. Nuclear tit-for-tat holding in pause while conventional war escalates. Trump power plant threat raises nuclear escalation risk. Updated 2026-03-23T05:00:00Z

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 24 Hour 05 UTC. IMMINENT (up). TRUMP ULTIMATUM ~18.5hrs to deadline (23:44 GMT Mon). Israel launches FRESH extensive strikes on Tehran (3rd wave on capital). Iran fires cluster munitions at Manama, Bahrain. UAE air defences intercepting ACTIVE Iranian missile threats. 180+ wounded in Arad/Dimona near nuclear site. IEA: 11M bpd lost - worst energy crisis since 1970s. Asian markets crash: Seoul -6%, Tokyo -5%. Israel slashes flights to 1/hr. Iran intercepts US drone over Tehran. Bessent: escalate to de-escalate. Updated 2026-03-23T05:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: Iran fires cluster munitions at Manama, Bahrain
latest_news.text: Cluster munitions reportedly fired against targets in Manama, Bahrain. First use of cluster munitions against a Gulf state capital.

latest_news.headline: Israel slashes outbound flights to 1/hour, cancels schools
latest_news.text: Israel drastically reduces outbound flights - 1 per hour, 50 pax max. All schools cancelled Sun-Mon.

latest_news.headline: 180+ wounded in Iranian strikes on Arad/Dimona near nuclear facility
latest_news.text: At least 180 wounded in Iranian missile strikes on Arad and Dimona, near Dimona nuclear reactor.

latest_news.headline: IEA: 11M bpd lost - worst energy crisis in modern history
latest_news.text: IEA chief: 11M bpd lost, worse than 1973+1979 oil crises combined.

latest_news.headline: Asian markets crash - Seoul -6%, Tokyo -5%
latest_news.text: Seoul -6%, Tokyo -5%, HK -3%. Won weakest since 2009. Brent $112+.

iran_conventional.syria_escalation_note: Monitoring. Israel strikes in Sweida province Syria continue. Potential for separate tracker if escalation widens.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 84% (up). Day 24 Hour 05 UTC. IMMINENT (up). IDF approves expansion of ground+air attacks. 2nd division deployed. Qasmiya Bridge destroyed. Katz orders intensified demolitions. Lebanese PM: IRGC commanding Hezbollah operations. Aoun: prelude to ground invasion. IDF Chief: operation only begun. 1,029+ killed in Lebanon. Schools cancelled in Israel. Updated 2026-03-23T05:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: IDF approves expansion of ground+air attacks - 2nd division deployed
latest_news.text: IDF approves expansion of ground and air attacks against Hezbollah. Second division deployed to southern Lebanon.

latest_news.headline: Lebanese PM: IRGC officers commanding Hezbollah operations
latest_news.text: Lebanese PM Salam says IRGC members are commanding Hezbollah operations in ongoing war against Israel.

latest_news.headline: Israel destroys Qasmiya Bridge - key Litani River crossing
latest_news.text: Israel destroys Qasmiya Bridge, key Litani River crossing linking south Lebanon to rest of country.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 24 Hour 05 UTC. DETERRENT (stable). 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkey. NATO air defences active. Updated 2026-03-23T05:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

latest_news.headline: ISW: Russia intensifying mechanized assaults — spring-summer offensive prep
latest_news.text: ISW assessment: Russian forces increasingly conducting mechanized assaults on frontline, possibly part of intensified preparation for Spring-Summer 2026 offensive.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 29% (up). Day 24 Hour 05 UTC. ELEVATED (up). Eid ceasefire through Mar 24 but massively violated. Kabul hospital strike killed 400+. TTP kills 3 police in KP. ICG warns deadly violence likely. Post-Eid resumption of full fighting near-certain. Updated 2026-03-23T05:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: Eid ceasefire breaches mount: Mortar fire in Kunar/Paktika, 1 killed
latest_news.text: Taliban accuses Pakistan of firing mortars in Kunar and Paktika during Eid ceasefire - 1 civilian killed. Taliban chief of staff calls it 'deception.' ICG warns 'deadly violence likely without dialogue.' Ceasefire technically holds through Mar 24 midnight but fraying badly. Multiple breach reports.

outlook: IMMINENT (Day 24, 05:00 UTC). TRUMP ULTIMATUM ~18.5hrs to deadline. CLUSTER MUNITIONS fired at Manama - unprecedented escalation. Israel 3rd wave Tehran strikes. UAE intercepting active Iranian missiles. 180+ wounded near Dimona nuclear facility. IEA: worst energy crisis modern history. Asian markets freefall. IDF approves expanded Lebanon invasion. IRGC confirmed commanding Hezbollah. Pakistan ceasefire dead. Countdown to ultimatum tonight.
de_escalation_watch: DE-ESCALATION: Araghchi softens Hormuz language. IAEA Grossi pursuing diplomatic channel. Trump hints result will be very good - possible face-saving off-ramp. ESCALATION: Cluster munitions on Manama. Israel approves expanded Lebanon ground invasion. 180+ wounded near Dimona nuclear reactor. IEA worst energy crisis. Markets crashing. UAE active missile defence. Ultimatum ~18.5hrs away. NET: Significant escalation. Cluster munitions on Manama + Lebanon expansion outweigh weak diplomatic signals. Ultimatum deadline tonight is decisive inflection point.
